description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Compensation Workbench product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: Compensation Workbench).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.15. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Compensation Workbench.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in  unauthorized access to critical data or complete access to all Oracle Compensation Workbench accessible data as well as  unauthorized update, insert or delete access to some of Oracle Compensation Workbench accessible data. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 7.1 (Confidentiality and Integrity impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N).
